qa_pair.question: What is the email address of the currently authenticated user?
What is the full name of the currently authenticated user? Answer with "First Last" format.
How many documents does the authenticated user have access to in total? Answer with just the number.
Search for documents containing "compte rendu". How many results are returned? Answer with just the number.
What is the first heading (line starting with #) in the most recently updated document? Include the # symbol.
Search for "Data Platform", then retrieve the content of the first result in markdown format. Does the document contain the word "MCP"? Answer True or False.
How many child sub-pages does the document titled "Compte rendu Data Platform" have? First search for the document to find its ID, then list its children. Answer with just the number.
List documents with page_size=2. What is the title of the second document on page 1? Answer with the exact title.

Retrieve the content of the oldest document (by created_at) in HTML format. Does the HTML contain a

tag? Answer True or False.

Create a document titled "MCP Eval Test" with markdown content "# Test\n\nThis is an evaluation test." Then retrieve its content in markdown format. Does the retrieved content contain "evaluation test"? Answer True or False.
